name: Composite Leading Indicator (CLI)
notes: Above 100 and rising = above-trend expansion; below 100 and falling = below-trend slowdown

name: Unemployment Rate
notes: Seasonally adjusted total unemployment. Sustained rise = labour market deterioration signal. CHN and EA19 not available in OECD LFS.

name: Short-term Interest Rate (3M)
notes: 3-month interbank rate (measure IR3TIB on OECD DSD_STES@DF_FINMARK); proxy for policy rate trajectory. Rising = tightening cycle; falling = easing. CHN not available.

name: India 10Y Government Bond Yield
notes: India 10Y government benchmark yield, direct from the OECD STES DF_FINMARK dataflow (measure IRLT) via sources/oecd.py — the resilient primary replacing the interim DBnomics OECD mirror wired for §2.A A2-IND (dropped this pass). OECD relocated this series from the discontinued MEI IRLTLT01 to DF_FINMARK, which stays current. Verified live via the adapter 2026-07-15: 174 obs 2011-12 -> 2026-05 = 7.02 (matches the frozen FRED INDIRLTLT01STM tail exactly). Fans out to column IND_GOVT_10Y; wins the tier merge over the frozen FRED T1 fallback on freshness.
